channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump selects Jay Clayton as Director of National Intelligence nominee
item.description: President Donald Trump announced Thursday he is nominating Jay Clayton, U.S. attorney for the Southern District of New York and former SEC chair.

item.title: Trump's $350 billion 'arsenal of freedom' plan faces GOP doubts
item.description: Trump urges Republicans to pass a third reconciliation bill with $350 billion for defense and voter ID, but GOP skepticism is rising.

item.title: Vance's chief of staff to depart by end of summer
item.description: Jacob Reses, chief of staff to Vice President JD Vance, will leave the administration by summer's end, according to NBC News.

item.title: Trump announces official DNI nominee after Pulte pick faced strong opposition
